NAM.BUR₂.BI IM.BABBAR na₄[...]

namburbû-ritual. Gypsum, [...]-stone, [...]

r 12'12'

ZI₃.DA MUNU₅ UKUŠ₂.⸢TI⸣.[GIL₂.LA ...]

malt flour, colocynth, [...]

r 13'13'

TEŠ₂.BI tuš-te-em-mi-⸢id⸣ [...]

you mix together. [...]

r 14'14'

it-ti ŠINIG u₂[...]

with tamarisk [...]

r 15'15'

U₂-ḪI.A an-nu-te ta-[...]

these plants you [...]

i-ra-am-mu-uk [...]

he bathes. [...]
